name: Kirkland's, Inc.
summary: Kirkland's, Inc. operates as a specialty retailer of home d√É¬©cor in the United States. The company's stores provide various merchandise, including holiday d√É¬©cor, furniture, textiles, ornamental wall d√É¬©cor, decorative accessories, art, mirrors, fragrance and accessories, lamps, artificial floral products, housewares, outdoor living items, gifts, and frames. Its stores also offer an assortment of holiday merchandise in seasonal periods. The company operates its stores under the Kirkland's, Kirkland's Home, Kirkland's Home Outlet, Kirkland's Outlet, and The Kirkland Collection names. As of January 30, 2021, the company operated 373 stores in 35 states, as well as an e-commerce website, www.kirklands.com. Kirkland's, Inc. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Brentwood, Tennessee.
